reason: No reviewed official execution path simultaneously used the exact supplier pin, installed only fully pinned artifacts, kept fixture content at zero provider egress, avoided unpinned model downloads, and cleared the dependency/vulnerability gate. Hindsight none-LLM mode is genuine but still requires an embeddings provider; the local and ONNX paths require separately downloaded model/native artifacts, while slim remote providers would create data egress.
decision: Preserve the negative result; do not substitute a fake score for a Hindsight run.

future_runtime_prerequisites.loopback_only: Every supplier listener must bind to 127.0.0.1.

static_commands: static parsing of uv.lock with Python tomllib
OSV querybatch for exact registry package versions
PyPI JSON metadata queries for exact dependency versions
command_notes: The uv tree command did not resolve or install anything; it stopped because the supplier .python-version requests Python 3.11 and no managed 3.11 interpreter was locally available.
All source, lock, license, configuration, and client inspection was static.
The disposable audit clone was removed after review; no other vendor-cache path was removed.
The fake-client test exercises ATC translation and cleanup only; it is not supplier execution and produces no benchmark score.

adapter_boundary.cleanup: delete isolated bank and close injected client
